title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly handling code writing, review, experiments, and AI safety research, marking early-stage recursive self-improvement in AI systems. Both Anthropic and OpenAI have signaled concerns about accelerating AI development, with Claude now performing substantive work in the creation of better AI systems.
